title: Prevent User Enumeration in Spring Applications
description: Prevent user enumeration in Spring applications by ensuring that the web application does not disclose the existence of a username during authentication.
recommendation: Use a generic message like 'bad credentials' instead of disclosing whether the username or password was incorrect during the authentication.
impact: Allows attackers to perform brute force attacks, impacting user privacy and facilitating other attacks.

checks.message: Method name contains user-related keywords that may enable user enumeration
